uc_rebalancing.title: UC rebalancing analysis
uc_rebalancing.description: From April 2026 the Universal Credit Act 2025 introduces two changes under a single rebalancing flag: an above-inflation uplift to the standard allowance, reaching 4.8% cumulatively by 2029-30, and a fixed monthly health element of £217.26 for new claimants. This dashboard toggles gov.dwp.universal_credit.rebalancing.active, so the reported impact is the net effect of both legs against a counterfactual where the rebalancing package is switched off.

loser_new_lcwra.label: Single 25+ LCWRA, new claimant from April 2026
